title: geranium sanguineum var. prostratum
intro: Geranium sanguineum var. prostratum, also known as the Alpine Geranium or Spreading Cranesbill, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin issues, and infections. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety, improving sleep, and alleviating menstrual cramps, due to its content of flavonoids, tannins, and other compounds. Geranium sanguineum var. prostratum can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to soothe skin irritations, calm the mind, and promote overall well-being.
